content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "聽不懂，請再說一次",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "不好意思，我聽不懂你的意思。可以再說一次嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎo yìsi, wǒ tīng bù dǒng nǐ de yìsi. Kěyǐ zài shuō yī cì ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "bu4 hao3 yi4 si5, wo3 ting1 bu4 dong3 ni3 de5 yi4 si5. ke3 yi3 zai4 shuo1 yi1 ci4 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, I don't understand what you mean. Can you say it again?",
          "translation_ko": "죄송합니다만, 무슨 뜻인지 모르겠어요. 한 번 더 말씀해 주시겠어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "沒問題。我說，這個句子有錯誤，需要改一下。",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí. Wǒ shuō, zhège jùzi yǒu cuòwù, xūyào gǎi yīxià.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "mei2 wen4 ti2. wo3 shuo1, zhe4 ge5 ju4 zi5 you3 cuo4 wu4, xu1 yao4 gai3 yi1 xia4.",
          "translation_en": "No problem. I said, this sentence has a mistake and needs to be corrected.",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮아요. 제가 말한 건, 이 문장에 오류가 있어서 고쳐야 한다는 거예요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "哦，原來是這樣。我以為你說的是答案有問題。",
          "pinyin": "Ó, yuánlái shì zhèyàng. Wǒ yǐwéi nǐ shuō de shì dá'àn yǒu wèntí.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "o2, yuan2 lai2 shi4 zhe4 yang4. wo3 yi3 wei2 ni3 shuo1 de5 shi4 da2 an4 you3 wen4 ti2.",
          "translation_en": "Oh, I see. I thought you meant the answer had a problem.",
          "translation_ko": "아, 그렇군요. 저는 답에 문제가 있다고 말씀하시는 줄 알았어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "不是的，是句子本身有錯誤。我們確認一下，好嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Bù shì de, shì jùzi běnshēn yǒu cuòwù. Wǒmen quèrèn yīxià, hǎo ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "bu4 shi4 de5, shi4 ju4 zi5 ben3 shen1 you3 cuo4 wu4. wo3 men5 que4 ren4 yi1 xia4, hao3 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "No, it's the sentence itself that has a mistake. Let's confirm it, okay?",
          "translation_ko": "아니에요, 문장 자체에 오류가 있는 거예요. 확인해 볼까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "好的，對不起，我誤會了。請你解釋清楚。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, duìbuqǐ, wǒ wùhuì le. Qǐng nǐ jiěshì qīngchu.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "hao3 de5, dui4 bu5 qi3, wo3 wu4 hui4 le5. qing3 ni3 jie3 shi4 qing1 chu5.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, sorry, I misunderstood. Please explain clearly.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 죄송합니다. 제가 오해했어요. 분명히 설명해 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "沒關係。這個句子的意思是「我喜歡喝咖啡」，不是「我喜歡喝茶」。",
          "pinyin": "Méi guānxi. Zhège jùzi de yìsi shì 'wǒ xǐhuān hē kāfēi', bù shì 'wǒ xǐhuān hē chá'.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "mei2 guan1 xi5. zhe4 ge5 ju4 zi5 de5 yi4 si5 shi4 'wo3 xi3 huan1 he1 ka1 fei1', bu4 shi4 'wo3 xi3 huan1 he1 cha2'.",
          "translation_en": "No problem. The meaning of this sentence is 'I like to drink coffee', not 'I like to drink tea'.",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮아요. 이 문장의 뜻은 '저는 커피 마시는 것을 좋아합니다'이고, '차 마시는 것을 좋아합니다'가 아니에요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我明白了。謝謝你的解釋。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ míngbái le. Xièxie nǐ de jiěshì.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "wo3 ming2 bai2 le5. xie4 xie5 ni3 de5 jie3 shi4.",
          "translation_en": "I understand. Thank you for the explanation.",
          "translation_ko": "이해했어요. 설명해 주셔서 감사합니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did speaker A originally misunderstand?",
          "question_ko": "화자 A는 원래 무엇을 오해했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["The sentence had a mistake", "The answer had a problem", "The coffee was bad"],
          "options_ko": ["문장에 오류가 있었다", "답에 문제가 있었다", "커피가 나빴다"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tones and the phrase '聽不懂'.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice saying: '對不起，我聽不懂。可以再說一次嗎？' and explain what you misunderstood."
    },
    {
      "title": "請說慢一點",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "不好意思，你說得太快了。可以說慢一點嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎo yìsi, nǐ shuō de tài kuài le. Kěyǐ shuō màn yīdiǎn ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "bu4 hao3 yi4 si5, ni3 shuo1 de5 tai4 kuai4 le5. ke3 yi3 shuo1 man4 yi1 dian3 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, you spoke too fast. Can you speak a little slower?",
          "translation_ko": "죄송합니다만, 너무 빠르게 말씀하셨어요. 조금 천천히 말씀해 주시겠어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好的，我慢慢說。這個問題的答案是什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, wǒ màn man shuō. Zhège wèntí de dá'àn shì shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "hao3 de5, wo3 man4 man5 shuo1. zhe4 ge5 wen4 ti2 de5 da2 an4 shi4 shen2 me5?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I'll speak slowly. What is the answer to this question?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 천천히 말할게요. 이 질문의 답은 무엇인가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "嗯…我以為答案是「三」，可是你說的是「四」嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Ēn... wǒ yǐwéi dá'àn shì 'sān', kěshì nǐ shuō de shì 'sì' ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "en1... wo3 yi3 wei2 da2 an4 shi4 'san1', ke3 shi4 ni3 shuo1 de5 shi4 'si4' ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Hmm... I thought the answer was 'three', but did you say 'four'?",
          "translation_ko": "음... 저는 답이 '3'이라고 생각했는데, '4'라고 말씀하셨나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "不是的，我說的是「三」。你聽錯了。",
          "pinyin": "Bù shì de, wǒ shuō de shì 'sān'. Nǐ tīng cuò le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "bu4 shi4 de5, wo3 shuo1 de5 shi4 'san1'. ni3 ting1 cuo4 le5.",
          "translation_en": "No, I said 'three'. You misheard.",
          "translation_ko": "아니에요, 제가 '3'이라고 말했어요. 잘못 들으셨어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "對不起，我聽錯了。請你再說一次，慢一點。",
          "pinyin": "Duìbuqǐ, wǒ tīng cuò le. Qǐng nǐ zài shuō yī cì, màn yīdiǎn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "dui4 bu5 qi3, wo3 ting1 cuo4 le5. qing3 ni3 zai4 shuo1 yi1 ci4, man4 yi1 dian3.",
          "translation_en": "Sorry, I misheard. Please say it again, slower.",
          "translation_ko": "죄송합니다, 잘못 들었어요. 다시 한 번 천천히 말씀해 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "沒關係。答案是「三」。你明白了嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Méi guānxi. Dá'àn shì 'sān'. Nǐ míngbái le ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "mei2 guan1 xi5. da2 an4 shi4 'san1'. ni3 ming2 bai2 le5 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "No problem. The answer is 'three'. Do you understand?",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮아요. 답은 '3'입니다. 이해하셨나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "明白了，謝謝。",
          "pinyin": "Míngbái le, xièxie.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "ming2 bai2 le5, xie4 xie5.",
          "translation_en": "I understand, thank you.",
          "translation_ko": "이해했어요, 감사합니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did speaker A mishear?",
          "question_ko": "화자 A는 무엇을 잘못 들었습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Three as four", "Four as three", "Slow as fast"],
          "options_ko": ["3을 4로", "4를 3으로", "느리다를 빠르다로"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence slowly, emphasizing '說慢一點' and '聽錯了'.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice saying: '對不起，我聽錯了。可以再說一次，慢一點嗎？'"
    },
    {
      "title": "確認意思",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我想確認一下你的意思。你說的「改時間」是改到明天嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ xiǎng quèrèn yīxià nǐ de yìsi. Nǐ shuō de 'gǎi shíjiān' shì gǎi dào míngtiān ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "wo3 xiang3 que4 ren4 yi1 xia4 ni3 de5 yi4 si5. ni3 shuo1 de5 'gai3 shi2 jian1' shi4 gai3 dao4 ming2 tian1 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "I want to confirm what you mean. Does 'change the time' mean change to tomorrow?",
          "translation_ko": "무슨 뜻인지 확인하고 싶어요. '시간을 바꾸다'라는 게 내일로 바꾸는 건가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "不是的，我是說改到後天。對不起，我沒有說清楚。",
          "pinyin": "Bù shì de, wǒ shì shuō gǎi dào hòutiān. Duìbuqǐ, wǒ méiyǒu shuō qīngchu.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "bu4 shi4 de5, wo3 shi4 shuo1 gai3 dao4 hou4 tian1. dui4 bu5 qi3, wo3 mei2 you3 shuo1 qing1 chu5.",
          "translation_en": "No, I meant change to the day after tomorrow. Sorry, I didn't say it clearly.",
          "translation_ko": "아니요, 모레로 바꾸는 거라고 말했어요. 죄송합니다, 제가 분명히 말하지 않았네요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "原來是這樣。我以為是明天，其實是後天。",
          "pinyin": "Yuánlái shì zhèyàng. Wǒ yǐwéi shì míngtiān, qíshí shì hòutiān.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "yuan2 lai2 shi4 zhe4 yang4. wo3 yi3 wei2 shi4 ming2 tian1, qi2 shi2 shi4 hou4 tian1.",
          "translation_en": "I see. I thought it was tomorrow, but it's actually the day after tomorrow.",
          "translation_ko": "그렇군요. 저는 내일인 줄 알았는데, 사실은 모레였네요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "對，就是這樣。我們再確認一次，好嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Duì, jiù shì zhèyàng. Wǒmen zài quèrèn yī cì, hǎo ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "dui4, jiu4 shi4 zhe4 yang4. wo3 men5 zai4 que4 ren4 yi1 ci4, hao3 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Yes, that's right. Let's confirm once more, okay?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 그렇습니다. 한 번 더 확인할까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "好的。所以我們後天見面，對不對？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de. Suǒyǐ wǒmen hòutiān jiànmiàn, duì bù duì?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "hao3 de5. suo3 yi3 wo3 men5 hou4 tian1 jian4 mian4, dui4 bu5 dui4?",
          "translation_en": "Okay. So we meet the day after tomorrow, right?",
          "translation_ko": "네. 그러면 모레 만나는 거죠, 맞나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "對，沒有問題。謝謝你確認。",
          "pinyin": "Duì, méiyǒu wèntí. Xièxie nǐ quèrèn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "dui4, mei2 you3 wen4 ti2. xie4 xie5 ni3 que4 ren4.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, no problem. Thank you for confirming.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 문제없어요. 확인해 주셔서 감사합니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "When will they meet?",
          "question_ko": "그들은 언제 만납니까?",
          "options_en": ["Tomorrow", "The day after tomorrow", "Today"],
          "options_ko": ["내일", "모레", "오늘"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence, focusing on '確認' and '原來是這樣'.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice saying: '我想確認一下你的意思。是後天嗎？' and explain the plan."
    }
  ]
}
